summary: Gradle build failed because tests failed during the test task; a test report was generated under hibernate-core/target/reports/tests.
root_cause: The Gradle test task failed because there were failing tests, as indicated by org.gradle.api.internal.exceptions.MarkedVerificationException and the generated test report at hibernate-core/target/reports/tests/test/index.html.

evidence.quote: Caused by: org.gradle.api.internal.exceptions.MarkedVerificationException: There were failing tests. See the report at: file:///home/runner/work/hibernate-orm/hibernate-orm/hibernate-core/target/reports/tests/test/index.html
evidence.reason: This exception explicitly states that tests failed and points to the test report location, identifying failing tests as the immediate cause of the build failure.
Shows the Gradle build terminated with failure after running tasks (including tests).
CI job exited with a non-zero status, consistent with a test/task failure causing the workflow to fail.
Indicates that test reports were uploaded as an artifact and can be downloaded for inspection of failing tests.

suggested_fix: Download or open the generated test report at file:///home/runner/work/hibernate-orm/hibernate-orm/hibernate-core/target/reports/tests/test/index.html (or download the uploaded artifact 'test-reports-java11-hsqldb') to see individual failing tests, then fix the failing tests or update expectations so the Gradle test task passes.
